title: Benton Locksmith | 24/7 Mobile Service | Arkey Lock
metaDesc: Mobile locksmith in Benton, AR off I-30. Car keys, lockouts, home & business rekeys at your door from Hot Springs. Call (501) 617-8872.
heroSub: Benton sits northeast of Hot Springs along I-30, the Saline County seat and a fast-growing commuter city. Arkey Locksmith comes right to you for car keys, lockouts, and home or business rekeys — no tow, no wait.

sections.html:
Locksmith Service for Benton & Saline County

Benton is the Saline County seat and one of the fastest-growing cities between Hot Springs and Little Rock, sitting right on the I-30 corridor. New subdivisions, busy retail along Alcoa Road and Military Road, a historic downtown, and thousands of daily commuters all add up to plenty of lock-and-key needs. Arkey Locksmith brings a fully stocked mobile shop to your door in Benton, so a lost key or a stuck lock never has to derail your day or your commute.

Auto & Truck

Locked out, lost your only key, or worn-out fob? We cut and program car keys, fobs, transponder keys, and smart keys on site — in your driveway, at work, or roadside on I-30.

Home & Property

Rekeys after a move or home sale, new deadbolts, and house lockouts for Benton’s neighborhoods and new subdivisions.

Business & Retail

Rekeys for staff turnover, master key systems, and access control for the shops and offices along Military Road and Alcoa Road.

Mobile Locksmith Built for a Commuter City

In a city where so many people drive to Little Rock and back every day, a lost car key or a lockout can throw off your whole schedule. A mobile locksmith fixes that fast. We load the van with key blanks, programming gear, and lock hardware so most jobs finish in one trip — right where you are parked.

  • Car, truck & SUV keys cut and programmed in your driveway
  • Home and business lockouts opened without damage
  • Rekeys after a move, a home sale, or a lost set of keys
  • New deadbolts and stronger locks on doors and rentals
  • Roadside help for keys locked in the car along I-30

Neighborhoods & Areas We Cover in Benton

Benton spreads out from its downtown square across new and established neighborhoods and the busy commercial corridors. If you are anywhere in or around the city, we will come to you. Areas we regularly reach include:

  • Downtown Benton and the Saline County courthouse square
  • The Alcoa Road and Military Road retail corridors
  • Salem and the south-Benton neighborhoods
  • New subdivisions off Congo Road and Hwy 5
  • Homes around Lake Norrell and the Saline River
  • The I-30 corridor and routes toward Bryant and Bauxite

Not sure how to describe where you are? A street name and a nearby landmark — a store, a school, or an I-30 exit number — is plenty for us to find you.

Why Locksmith Calls Happen Around Benton

A growing city sees its share of lock-and-key moments. Homes change hands constantly, and new owners want the locks rekeyed so old keys are useless. Renters and landlords need turnovers handled between tenants. Commuters lose the only fob to a push-to-start car and cannot wait days for the dealer. And busy retail and office spaces need to control who holds a key as staff come and go.

We handle all of it on site. Our car keys cost far less than the dealership, and because we come to you, there is no tow bill and no waiting days for a key to ship. One important note: we do not bill insurance — locksmith work is paid directly, and we keep our pricing straightforward so you know what you are paying before we start.

Quick Reach Up I-30 From Hot Springs

Benton is a straight shot up I-30 from Hot Springs, so we can get to you without the long wait. Arkey Locksmith is locally owned — you reach us directly, not a national call center routing your job to a stranger. We are fully mobile, licensed and insured, with more than 15 years of experience, and we offer discounts for veterans and seniors. Tell us your address or a nearby exit, and we will head your way. One thing we do not do is safe work — for that we will point you to the right pro.

faqs.a: Yes. Benton is part of our regular service area. We are a fully mobile locksmith based out of Hot Springs and travel up I-30 to Benton and across Saline County for car keys, lockouts, and home or business work.

faqs.q: How fast can you get to me in Benton?
faqs.a: Benton is a straight run northeast of Hot Springs on I-30, so we can usually reach you quickly. We are open 24/7 — call (501) 617-8872, give us your location, and we will give you an honest arrival time.

faqs.q: Can you make a car key at my place in Benton?
faqs.a: Yes. We carry equipment to cut and program many transponder keys, fobs, and smart keys on site, so your vehicle stays put — in your driveway, at work, or roadside. Car keys from us cost far less than the dealership.

faqs.q: Can you rekey my house after I buy it in Benton?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Rekeying is one of our most common jobs. When a home changes hands, we rekey the locks so any old keys no longer work, and we can add stronger deadbolts while we are there. Great for new subdivisions and resales alike.

faqs.q: Do you handle commercial locks for Benton businesses?
faqs.a: Yes. We rekey for staff turnover, set up master key systems, and install access control and exit hardware for shops and offices along Military Road, Alcoa Road, and downtown. Call us for a quote on your building.

Yes. Arkey Locksmith is licensed and insured with over 15 years of experience, and we offer discounts for veterans and seniors. Please note we do not service safes, and locksmith work is paid directly rather than billed through insurance.

keywords: Benton locksmith, locksmith Benton AR, mobile locksmith, car keys, lockout service, home rekey, Saline County locksmith, commercial locksmith Benton
